sect.dawn.text: The dawn bell rings; the courtyard is still cold.
First light over Nine-Peak. The disciples are not yet awake.

sect.dusk.text: Dusk settles on the sect. Lanterns appear in the elder quarters one by one.

sect.midday.text: Noon in the sect. A brief stillness between the morning drills and the afternoon scripture.
Midday. The sun finds no shade on the outer courtyard stones.

sect.locales.outer_sect_courtyard.text: The outer courtyard, swept clean before dawn, already dusty from a hundred drills.
Flagstones worn smooth by ten thousand footsteps. The courtyard asks no questions.
Outer courtyard. Stakes for sparring. Racks for weapons. The smell of effort.

sect.locales.scripture_hall.text: The scripture hall, smelling of old paper and lamp oil, its shelves reaching the rafters.
Rows of jade slips and yellowed tomes. The scripture hall never quite warms.
Candlelight on old text. The scripture hall forgives nothing misread.

sect.locales.meditation_cave.text: The meditation caves cut into the north face. Qi pools there, heavy and old.
A cave in the cliff. Cold stone, near-darkness, the breath of the mountain.
Meditation cave. Silence deep enough to drown in.

sect.locales.beast_pass.text: The Beast Pass, where the mountain's spirit-beasts test the disciples who dare it.
Narrow trail, claw-gouged rock. The beasts have been here. Recently.
Above the Beast Pass, the sky looks different — heavier, like it is watching.

sect.locales.alchemy_pavilion.text: The alchemy pavilion, its chimney trailing sweet-bitter smoke at all hours.
Smoke and heat and the smell of burning herbs. The pavilion never sleeps.
Alchemy pavilion. Everything is stained. The air here can make you cough for an hour.

sect.locales.elder_quarters.text: The elder quarters, their doors lacquered red, their windows never open to disciples.
Past the pine grove: the elder quarters. Heavy and silent.

sect.elder.demeanor.text: The elder speaks slowly, as though measuring each word against ten thousand days of practice.
The elder's voice is flat, clipped. Wasted syllables are wasted qi.
The elder looks up from the jade slip, expression unreadable, then back down. A test, maybe.

sect.senior_brother.tone.text: The senior brother crosses his arms. His assessment is complete before he speaks.
Senior Brother speaks with the casual authority of someone who has already survived this.

sect.junior_sister.tone.text: The junior sister's question is earnest. She doesn't yet know to hide it.
Junior Sister hesitates, then asks anyway. Bravery, or ignorance — hard to tell.

sect.robe.text: The grey outer-sect robe, stiff at the collar, smelling of the storage chest.
Outer-sect grey. It tells everyone what you are, before you open your mouth.

pill.smoke.text: The pill dissolves on the tongue in a burst of bitter heat, then warmth spreading to the meridians.
Bitter. Then nothing. Then a warmth below the ribs.

realm.qi_sensing.awaken.text: The world holds its breath. Then — something opens, like a second pair of eyes behind the first.
Qi Sensing First Layer. The meridians stop being walls. For the first time, there is a door.
A trembling in the meridians. Then clarity, sudden as a bell. This is what they meant.

technique.manifest.fire.text: The technique moves through the meridians like a coal that will not cool.
Fire qi. The hands warm before the form is complete.

technique.manifest.sword.text: The sword intent sharpens in the chest, a pressure that wants a direction.
Edge. The sensation is always of an edge that isn't there yet.

technique.manifest.body.text: The body technique settles into the bones like ballast — heavy, solid, true.
Not speed. Not force. The body technique teaches stillness first.

technique.manifest.wind.text: The wind technique moves through the form like a thought: present, then gone.
Light. The technique makes everything lighter. The feet nearly leave the stone.

terrain.azure_peaks.peak.text: The peak, bare rock above the cloud line, the wind here older than the sect.
Above. Always above. The peaks have no interest in below.

terrain.azure_peaks.vale.text: The Crystal Vale, mist-threaded, its bamboo thickets hiding springs that taste of mineral cold.
Down in the vale, the air is green and damp. Sound does not carry far.

terrain.azure_peaks.pavilion.text: A stone pavilion at the cliff's edge, built for cultivation, claimed by wind.
The mountain pavilion. Three walls and an open face toward the abyss.

ap.dawn.peak.text: First light cuts across the high peaks, leaving the courtyard in cold shadow.
Before dawn, the sect is still. The peaks glow before anything else.
Dawn on the mountain. The cold does not ask permission.

ap.outer.courtyard.text: The outer courtyard, its stones damp from the night, awaits the morning drill.
Courtyard. Empty now, but the day is coming.

ap.alchemy.pavilion.text: Smoke curls from the pavilion chimney before the sun is up.
The pavilion is always warm. The elixirs see to that.

ap.scripture.hall.candle.text: A single candle at a reading desk. The scripture hall before the others arrive.
Candle-lit hall. The texts do not care what hour it is.

ap.meditation.cave.text: The meditation cave, its qi dense enough to taste, the silence absolute.
Cold stone. Thick qi. The cave demands nothing, offers everything.

ap.beast.pass.lower.text: The lower Beast Pass, where first-year disciples are tested and sometimes carried home.
Lower pass. The beasts here are smaller. Their scars on the rock are not.

ap.elder.quarters.text: The elder quarters, lacquered doors, the smell of aged elixir and old wood.
A summons to the elder quarters is never trivial.

ap.outer.dining.hall.text: The outer dining hall, its tables crowded, its smell of steam and cheap grain.
Three hundred outer disciples. One hall. The food runs out from the edges in.

ap.mountain.path.text: The mountain path, switchbacking up through pine and mist, the top invisible.
Path up the mountain. Stone steps cut by old hands, worn by young feet.

ap.market.stalls.text: The sect's outer market, its stalls cluttered with cultivation materials and dubious claims.
Market stalls. Everything costs more than it should.

ap.gate.qs.sky.text: The sky above the Nine-Peak Gate is cloudless, pitiless. The test does not care if you are ready.
Gate of Qi Sensing. The meridians ache with anticipation.

ap.gate.qc.sky.text: Storm clouds on the horizon as the Qi Condensation threshold approaches. Coincidence, the elders say.
The sky changes at Qi Condensation. The heavens, apparently, are paying attention.

ap.gate.qc5.storm.text: Halfway through Qi Condensation — the midpoint storm, the old texts call it. They are not wrong.
QC Fifth Layer. The qi rebels before it submits. Thunder, internal and external both.

ap.gate.qc9.heavens.text: The ninth layer of Qi Condensation. The sect grows quiet. The elders watch without speaking.
QC Ninth. The heavens open one eye. The next step is Foundation Establishment — or death.

ap.gate.tech.scroll.text: A technique scroll, its jade case cracked, its contents intact. An opportunity.
The scroll sits on the reading stand. The technique inside has been waiting for the right reader.

ap.action.circulate.deep.text: The qi flows unobstructed, every meridian open, every breath a tide.
Deep circulation. The body forgets it is tired.

ap.action.circulate.steady.text: The qi moves in its familiar circuit. Not brilliant, but clean.
Steady. The meridians ask nothing impossible today.

ap.action.circulate.scattered.text: The qi tangles at the third meridian, as it always does. Another day of waiting.
Scattered. The mind wanders and takes the qi with it.

ap.action.spar.victory.text: The opponent hits the ground. A moment of silence, then acknowledgment.
Victory. Brief. The technique that won it will need to win again.

ap.action.spar.draw.text: Both cultivators step back, breathing hard. The outcome: unresolved.
A draw. Neither graceful. Both earned.

ap.action.spar.bruised.text: The counter comes faster than expected. The ground teaches what the drill did not.
Bruised. The lesson will leave marks.

ap.action.meditate.deep.text: Deep in the cave's silence, time folds. An hour passes like a breath.
The mind empties. The qi fills what's left.

ap.action.meditate.steady.text: Steady cultivation. Not transcendence, but progress. Progress is enough.
The meditation holds. Quiet and methodical. Forward.

ap.action.meditate.shallow.text: The surface only. The deeper silence refuses entry today.
Shallow. The mind will not settle. Something outside keeps pulling.

ap.action.meditate.scattered.text: The meditation collapses into thought. An hour wasted to the sound of one's own anxieties.
Scattered. Nothing settles. Start again tomorrow.

ap.action.chore.done.text: The task is done. No one notices. This is what outer disciples are for.
Done. The sect runs on labor like this, invisible and constant.

ap.action.chore.skimped.text: Good enough. The sect has not noticed yet. It probably will.

ap.action.errand.delivered.text: The delivery reaches its destination intact. A small trust, built.
Delivered. The steward nods once, which is more than most get.

ap.action.errand.dropped.text: The jar slips. The contents are not recoverable. The elder will hear of it.
Dropped. The sound it makes is exactly as bad as feared.

ap.action.errand.refused.text: The refusal is noted. Not immediately punished. But noted.

ap.action.meal.rest.text: The meal hall is loud. The food is plain. Rest is relative.
A full bowl, a bench, an hour to breathe. The body asks for little; today, it receives it.

ap.action.meal.rumor.text: Between bites, a rumor: an inner disciple has reached Foundation Establishment. The table goes quiet.
Rumor travels faster than sect bulletins. Someone heard something. Now everyone has.

ap.action.meal.silent.text: Eat alone. The noise of three hundred cultivators is its own kind of silence.

ap.action.scripture.absorbed.text: The text opens. The technique behind the words becomes visible, then almost audible.
Absorbed. The knowledge sits in the meridians before it sits in the mind.

ap.action.scripture.steady.text: The text yields its meaning in order, page by page. Progress.
Steady reading. The technique reveals itself in stages. Good.

ap.action.scripture.smudged.text: The ink is faded, the character unclear. A day spent guessing at a text.
Smudged. The copy was poor to begin with. The learning is partial.

ap.action.herb.bounty.text: The vale is generous today — the right herbs in the right places, easily gathered.
Bounty. Even the mountain has good days.

ap.action.herb.found.text: A useful find: not rare, but useful. The satchel feels worthwhile.
Found. The herb is smaller than ideal but fresh.

ap.action.herb.empty.text: The usual spots are picked clean. Someone was here first.
Empty. The mountain keeps its own schedule.
